speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Giving directions
questions: How do you go from your house to the nearest park?
Is the train station far from your home?
Do you prefer walking or taking the bus?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I go straight along my street, then turn left at the corner. The train station is not far from my home. I prefer walking when the weather is nice.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 2: Review — Describe your hometown

bullets: and explain what you like about it

speaking.sampleAnswer: I am from a small town. There is a small house near my hometown with a beautiful garden. There is a park opposite the supermarket, and the school is between the bank and the post office. I like my hometown because it is quiet and friendly.
